title: OlmoEarth Output Library
subtitle: One place to browse generated analysis bundles, open their interactive maps, and review summary stats before publication.
hint: To add a new output, append one object to `configs/output_catalog.json` with its `path` and optional labels/tags.

outputs.title: Shahdara 1-Year Smoke Run
outputs.description: Quick 1-year pilot over Shahdara district in Delhi.
